/usr/bin/c++ -std=c++11  -rdynamic CMakeFiles/sebot_arm.dir/unit/arm.cpp.o -o /root/workspace/sebot-t710-competition/sebot_factory/devel/lib/sebot_factory/sebot_arm   -L/usr/local/lib/libserial  -L/usr/local/lib/ppnc  -L/usr/local/lib/onnx  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib/libserial:/usr/local/lib/ppnc:/usr/local/lib/onnx:/opt/ros/melodic/lib /opt/ros/melodic/lib/libactionlib.so /opt/ros/melodic/lib/libroscpp.so /opt/ros/melodic/lib/librosconsole.so /opt/ros/melodic/lib/librosconsole_log4cxx.so /opt/ros/melodic/lib/librosconsole_backend_interface.so -llog4cxx -lboost_regex /opt/ros/melodic/lib/libxmlrpcpp.so /opt/ros/melodic/lib/libroscpp_serialization.so /opt/ros/melodic/lib/librostime.so /opt/ros/melodic/lib/libcpp_common.so -lboost_thread -lboost_chrono -lboost_date_time -lboost_atomic -lpthread /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libconsole_bridge.so.0.4 /opt/ros/melodic/lib/libroslib.so /opt/ros/melodic/lib/librospack.so -lpython2.7 -lboost_filesystem -lboost_program_options -lboost_system -ltinyxml2 -lserial
